docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED TO DEFENDANT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,286.25 FILED BY BELL, CHAD (ZEN DEN WEB DESIGN) AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN, CLIFF (STUDIOEXT) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED OCT-05-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN, CLIFF (STUDIOEXT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELL, CHAD (ZEN DEN WEB DESIGN) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAPLAN, CLIFF (STUDIOEXT) $6,286.25 PRINCIPAL, $127.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,413.75, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BELL, CHAD (ZEN DEN WEB DESIGN)
